title: parivoa biserrata
intro:
Parivoa biserrata is a type of plant that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and its name is often associated with the term "Parivoea" however I am unable to confirm any information regarding this plant, it is possible that this is a misspelling of a different plant name.

However, I can tell you that if you were looking for a plant called 'Parivoea'  then it is a type of vine that has medicinal properties.

The Parivoea vine has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties.
